signals.description: Personal website promotes ProgramBench and links to programbench.com alongside SWE-agent/SWE-bench agent evaluation research.
SWE-agent and SWE-bench are released as open-source projects with public leaderboard, code, and documentation at swe-agent.com.
AGILE agent framework, dataset, and code are publicly released on GitHub under the bytarnish organization with ProductQA benchmarks.
ToolkenGPT project page and code release document tool-use augmentation for frozen LLMs across reasoning and embodied planning tasks.
PIVOT-R publishes a project website with benchmark results, demos, and links to code for language-guided robotic manipulation.
Harvard Medical School faculty profile states Dr. Zitnik co-founded Therapeutics Data Commons, an open ML platform for therapeutic science.
Faculty website lists participation in Maitrix.org, an open-source consortium building AI-powered realities with agent and world models.
S3F protein fitness prediction model releases code on GitHub for multi-scale sequence-structure-surface representation learning.
Public MIT CSAIL profile and publication record show sustained academic research in planning and robotics without recent startup founder announcements.
